name: Chicken and Olive Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Oregon grown chicken, cooked and cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, blend together the cream, egg, egg yolks, salt, nutmeg, and cayenne.
2. Cube the cooked, seasoned chicken.
3. Place the quiche shell in a preheated oven.
4. Scatter the chopped olives over the chicken.
5. Pour the custard filling over the chicken and olives.
6. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 to 45 minutes.
Serves 4 to 6.
